title: Nothing Happened on Thriller Bark: Rising Conflict

scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of nothing happened on thriller bark: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Hey, hey. If you take any treasure...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Ah... so that makes it okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: In return, take this as my thanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The light is covering my entire body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Our Saviors are doing extra work!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's in the mansion getting bed rest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We brought what you asked for.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: His life was seriously in danger....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Luffy being unusually healthy is strange, too.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Starting from before I lost consciousness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All the damage he had taken!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: And let out a terrific yell...

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of nothing happened on thriller bark: rising conflict.
